## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Ed, Jason, and Bianca to discuss AI-led growth community platform development and website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Circle will be used as the core platform for the AI-led growth community, with a focus on resource-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Website redesign needed to highlight community resources and create a course catalog feel](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Social media strategy to be developed, inspired by Fletch PMM's approach of giving away valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

## Topics

### Circle Implementation

  - [Will use Circle for community hub at members.alagrow.com](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
  - [Exploring API capabilities for resource previews on main site](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)
  - [May need to set up separate CMS if API is insufficient](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
  - [Events will still use Luma, potentially embedded in custom landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Need to figure out member access/approval process for events](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)

### Website Redesign

  - [Goal is to make community resources more prominent on homepage](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Planning to move reviews section down, add fixed header with login/signup](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Aiming for a course catalog feel with "FOMO" inducement](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Will explore design options inspired by Reforge and other references](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Considering adding Marcel's face to hero section](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

### Social Media Strategy

  - [Inspired by Fletch PMM's consistent, recognizable style](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [Want to give away valuable content while teasing full resources](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Need to define different content types (workshops, guides, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2585.0)
  - [Exploring ways to create shareable graphics for complex topics](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2639.0)
  - [Balance between high-level public content and in-depth community resources](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2818.0)

### Personal Updates

  - [Jason recently returned from China trip with family](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Ed dealing with challenges of 7-week-old newborn](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=59.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ed to configure Circle and explore API capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
  - [Margium to work on small redesign of homepage resource section](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2874.0)
  - [Bianca to develop social media strategy ideas](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
  - [Create ticket for exploring graphic design approach inspired by Fletch PMM](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review progress on community platform and redesign](https://fathom.video/share/EU4VqVzKNF9KsMytgzxt4Kh3W8GvydZA?tab=summary&timestamp=2883.0)
